name: Increased Efficiency
preview:
MP is no longer consumed while Unique Weapon is active.
It consumes MP when attacking with Unique Weapon.
It recovers MP when Unique Weapon lands a Critical Hit.

name: Power Unit Change
preview:
Overclock no longer increases Skill Power.
Increases Firearm ATK instead.

name: Regenerative Braking
preview: Chance to recover MP when using skill

name: Nerve Infiltration
preview:
Applies stackable Burn.
Modifies Grenade Throw to deal Additional Damage per Burn stack.

name: Void Explosion : Focus
preview:
Using Expulsion grants Void Explosion that causes an explosion on the next melee attack.
When used as an Enhanced Skill, triggers a chain explosion.

name: Void Charge
preview:
Modifies Void Walk to be stackable, and Void Walk and Expulsion damage increases proportionally to DEF.
When used as an Enhanced Skill, Cooldown resets.

name: Matrix Recomputation
preview: Modifies Expulsion to grant a buff that helps allies survive

name: Body Enhancement
preview: Increases Max HP, DEF, and Max Shield, and using the skill fully restores Void Energy. However, skill cooldowns and skill costs increase.

name: Glacial Cloud
preview: Throws a projectile forward that spawns a Blizzard where it lands.

name: Hypothermia
preview:
When using skill, inflicts Ice Needle instead of Ice Shackle.
When Ice Needle reaches a certain number of stacks, passive skills are triggered.
Ice Needle: Continuous damage to the target. Damage increases as it stacks.

name: Cold Snap Watch
preview:
Creates a Cold Snap zone in front that remains for a certain period of time.
Enemies entering the Cold Snap zone are inflicted with Ice Shackle and suffer continuous damage.

name: Cold-Bloodedness
preview:
When using skill, increases Skill Power and decreases Skill Cost and Skill Cooldown.
Frost Roads are not created when moving.

name: Explosive Stacks
preview:
Modifies Grenade Throw to be replenished a certain number of times.
Grenade is replenished once every time a certain amount of ammo is consumed.

name: Firearms Master
preview:
Reloading increases Skill Range.
Using Grenade Throw or Traction Grenade grants an additional effect depending on the Weapon.

name: Turret Engineering
preview: When using skill, recovers the HP of all summoned turrets and extends their duration.

name: Immediate Purge Code
preview:
When using skill, instantly explodes all turrets and inflicts damage on nearby enemies.
Creates Lightning AoE that deals continuous damage where the turrets exploded.

preview: This Module is no longer available.

preview: This Module is no longer available.

preview: Changes Maximum Power into a form that causes damage around Bunny.

preview: Adds an effect that reduces the enemy's ATK to the Electrocution effect that Bunny inflicts.

name: Bionic Fuel
preview: Decreases speed of Speed of Light, but consumes HP instead of MP.

name: Mobile Fortress
preview: An Orbit Barrier and Hyper Cubes follow to defend against enemy attacks and deal damage.

name: Barrier Charge : Explosion
preview:
Changes to a skill to charge forward while holding an Orbit Barrier to deal damage to enemies and knock them back.
Using Expulsion grants Void Explosion effect that causes an explosion on the next melee attack.
When used as an Enhanced Skill, triggers a chain explosion.

name: Contagion
preview:
When an enemy inflicted with Room 0 Trauma is killed,
a contagion of Room 0 Trauma surrounds it.

name: Toxic Stimulation
preview:
Defense Mechanism skill conversion.
Grants Plague Bodyarmor to nearby allies.

name: Venom Synthesis
preview:
Putrid Venom skill conversion.
Leaves behind a Toxic Footprint after every step.
Inflicts Room 0 Trauma on enemies coming in contact with Toxic Footprint.

name: Neurotoxin Synthesis
preview:
Modifies the effects of Room 0 Trauma.
Does not spread Poison, but inflicts ATK reduction and Weaken Regeneration.

name: Venom Injection
preview:
When using skill, continuously consumes resources to grant self Toxic Sense.
While Toxic Sense is active, hitting an enemy with a firearm or a Skill inflicts Corrosion.

name: Toxic Mixture
preview:
Modifies the Room 0 Trauma effect to Necrosis.
Firearm ATK increases with the number of Necrosis stacks.

name: Super Senses
preview:
Inflicts Bleed with Life Siphon.
Attacking targets with Bleed with a Unique Weapon, increases damage.

name: Massive Sanguification
preview: Modifies Life Siphon to allow the absorption of Life Spheres during Non-Frenzied state.

name: Predator Instinct
preview:
While Frenzied, HP is not consumed.
Using a firearm while Frenzied gradually increases Firearm ATK.

name: Blood and Iron
preview:
When defeating enemies with a melee weapon, gains Life Spheres.
When attacking enemies with a melee weapon, gains Power of Life.
No longer uses a Unique Weapon, instead, firearms to deal AoE damage.

name: Explosive Life
preview:
The chance to create a Life Sphere is slightly increased. Detonates all nearby Life Spheres to deal damage instead of absorbing HP.
Recovers Power of Life based on the number of Life Spheres exploded.

name: Demonic Modification
preview:
The Unique Weapon consumes HP based on the duration of True Aim.
The Explosion Damage of bullets increases proportionally to the HP consumed, and attacking Weak Points increases the chance of HP Recovery.

name: Cold Cohesion
preview: The number of Ice Spheres increases to 5, and the base cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.

name: Absolute-Zero
preview:
When using skill, Ice Shackle is not inflicted.
When the skill lands a Critical Hit, inflicts Frostbite on the target.
Successfully inflicting Frostbite triggers Ice Sphere.

name: Release Cutting Force
preview: Modifies Cutoff Beam so that it can be unleashed as Sword Aura.

name: Overcharged Edge
preview: While Active Camouflage is active, attacking with a Melee Weapon or the Cutoff Beam skill converts to Overcharged Edge and consumes Shield to maintain the effect.

name: Focused Edge
preview:
Changes Flash Shortsword to Focused Edge that increases the number of Shortswords through attacking or defeating Assassination Targets.
Increases enemy targeting speed and range.

name: Battlesuit Melting Rounds
preview:
Modifies to stackable skill.
Decreases the enemy's Electric Resistance instead of stunning them.

name: Area Suppression
preview: Changes the skill to scatter Shortswords around. Each Shortsword deals independent damage.

name: Ambushed
preview: Modifies so that killing an enemy in Active Camouflage returns the user to the same state. In Active Camouflage, agility increases, and Shock Bomb skill is converted to an attack skill.

name: Noise Surge
preview:
When using skill, deals damage to nearby enemies but doesn't buff allies.
Grants a stackable buff to Luna that is enhanced with each stack.

name: Nimble Footsteps
preview: Granting a buff to allies increases Luna's Movement Speed and Skill Range.

name: Aggressive Melody
preview: Changes Passionate Stage and Delightful Stage effects to increase Firearm Damage and Weak Point Damage.

name: Singer's Mercy
preview: When using skill, sets up a Speaker that grants buffs to allies within range.

name: Battlefield Concert
preview:
Modifies Unique Weapon to inflict debuffs on enemies.
When using an Enhanced Skill, deals damage to the enemy and temporarily stops Note usage.

name: Battlefield Artist
preview:
Removes Unique Weapon.
Modifies effect to grant a Firearm buff to self.

name: Water Play
preview: Creates a rectangular-shaped Puddle of water in front of Valby.

name: Supply Moisture
preview:
While on water, increases Firearm Critical Hit Rate, Skill Critical Hit Rate, Skill Duration, and Firearm Attribute Trigger Rate.
MP recovery is not applied.

name: Tidal Wave
preview:
Does not leave watery trails when moving.
When moving through a monster, inflicts skill damage on them.
When the skill ends, deals Burst Damage to nearby enemies.

name: Singing Water
preview:
Spawns a Seduction of Water where the Unique Weapon's bullet explodes.
Until it is destroyed, the spawned Seduction of Water taunts surrounding monsters and inflicts Laundry on them.
When destroyed, it explodes and deals damage to nearby enemies.

name: Hydro Pressure Bomb
preview:
Leaps forward without creating a Puddle and deals damage to the surrounding enemies on landing.
The more enemies with Laundry, the more damage inflicted.

name: Spiral Tidal Wave
preview:
Bubbles no longer bounce off the ground, but are now projectiles fired forward.
Attracts Gluttony's impurities.

name: Superconductive Bombing MARK 2
preview:
When used on the ground, takes off and launches Superconductive Bombing in midair.
When used in midair, immediately launches Superconductive Bombing MARK 2.

name: Self-Directed Eruption
preview:
Consumes Magnetic Force every second when used to pull enemies in front of Kyle.
Deals great damage to nearby enemies when the skill ends.
But removes the ally Shield recovery effect.

name: Diamagnetic Bulwark
preview:
Instead of Magnetic Bulwark's projectile defense, knocks back enemies on contact.
Recovers Magnetic Force based on the number of Knockbacks.

name: Superconductive Bombing
preview:
While airborne, continuously consumes Magnetic Force to drop bombs.
The bombing stops when Magnetic Force is completely depleted, and additional damage from Magnetic Force is not triggered on collision.
Airborne duration increases as the Skill Duration increases, but the base airborne duration decreases.

name: Explosive Evade
preview: Spawns a Guided Landmine when rolling.

name: Cluster Bomb
preview: Detonating an attached bomb creates additional explosives at the detonated location.

name: Explosive Propaganda
preview:
Generates Explosive Propaganda.
The generated Explosive Propaganda taunts nearby monsters until destroyed,
upon which it explodes and causes great damage to nearby enemies.

name: Creative Explosion
preview:
After a dash, uses up all available bombs to inflict great damage to nearby enemies.
The more bombs available, the greater the damage inflicted.

name: Compressed Bullet
preview: Increases the number of bullets consumed when using a weapon, but grants additional effects.

name: Supply Firearm Enhancer
preview:
Summons a Firearm Enhancement Device.
Touching the device grants Weak Point Damage and Firearm Critical Hit Rate Up.

name: Reinforce Front Line
preview: Spawns a Front Line Reinforcement Device that grants a Firearm ATK Up to allies in range.

name: Focus Fire
preview:
Attaches a Combat Drone to himself.
On Firearm Critical Hit attack, increases the drone's duration.
Increases the Max Stack of Explosive Drone.

name: First Aid Kit
preview: This Module is no longer available.

name: Proliferating Allergy
preview:
Inflicts Explosive Reaction.
Deals damage to nearby enemies when the effect ends or the enemy dies.
Inflicts the same effect to nearby enemies when the enemy dies.

name: Duty and Sacrifice
preview: Grants Recovery and Recovery per Second to allies in the Squad and Party participating in the same mission.

name: Efficient Treatment
preview: This Module is no longer available.

name: Combat Protocol
preview: Cannot buff allies. Increases self-buff effects.

name: Battlefield Medic
preview: Buffing allies further increases offensive capabilities.

name: Incendiary Bomb
preview: Throws a projectile forward that spawns a Flame Zone where it lands.

name: Truly Deadly Cuisine
preview:
Significantly increases the damage of Giant Fireball.
When Giant Fireball explodes, Small Fireballs and Flame Zones do not spawn.

name: Backdraft
preview: MP Heal increases Weak Point Damage and Firearm ATK instead of Skill Power.

name: Classic Chef
preview:
Modifies the increase to Skill Critical Hit Rate to 9 based on the Flame Zone count.
Using Deadly Cuisine increases the number of Flame Zones created to 5.

name: Killer Recipe
preview:
Now applies an additional effect when attacking enemies afflicted with Burn.
Changed to fire a Meatball without generating a Flame Zone.
Changed to generate Chef’s Touch when attacking or defeating enemies with Burn, and deal damage by targeting the enemy.

name: Next-level Recipe
preview:
Changed to create Flame Zones after moving a certain distance.
Changed to Fire flames forward while moving quickly.

name: Electric Charge
preview:
Increases the landing damage after Rabbit Foot's Double Jump.
Double Jump deals significantly increased damage after hitting enemies with the skill a certain number of times.

name: High-Voltage
preview:
Reduces the number of enemies that Thrill Bomb and Lightning Emission can strike.
Increases range and damage instead.

name: Cryogenic Cluster Shot
preview: Modifies the Cryo effect to Cryogenic, reducing the number of maximum stacks and effect strength, but dealing additional AoE damage to nearby enemies when the effect is removed.

name: Supercooled Kuiper Round
preview:
Equipping a Unique Weapon decreases Additional Firearm ATK and Fire Rate, but increases Weak Point Damage and successfully attacking a Weak Point recovers Shield instead of MP.
The increase in Weak Point Damage decreases when firing a Unique Weapon, but increases again on a successful Weak Point attack.

name: Camouflaged Sniping
preview: Upon equipping her Unique Weapon, Hailey temporarily activates Camouflage, allowing her attacks to deal additional AoE damage to nearby enemies.

name: Cold Heart
preview:
Changes to a skill that attacks nearby targets with Chill when her Unique Weapon is not in use.
Cryo changes to Ultra Cryo.
Ultra Cryo: Max stacks remain the same, but when attacking with a skill, removes all stacked effects and deals additional damage.

name: Focus on Prey
preview:
Increases the number of projectiles fired and modifies Void Corrosion to target a single enemy.
Increases the maximum stacks of Acidic Decay.

name: Mobile Strike
preview: Septic Gust is adjusted to deal no damage. Grants the Adventurer's Spirit effect to self, preventing Onslaught stack reduction during the effect duration and applying Corrosion Acceleration to pierced targets.

name: Fierce Attack
preview:
Increases the number of Fierce Attack hits and adds Tow when using Septic Turbulence.
Using Tremor increases Fierce Attack stacks unconditionally.

name: Septic Torrent
preview:
When attacking enemies with a Melee Weapon increases Acidic Infusion Level
When using Hunt, quickly approaches the target and unleashes an AoE attack
When using Septic Torrent, unleashes a continuous damage attack on surrounding targets

name: Plasma Ball
preview:
Removes the increase Skill Critical Hit Rate proportional to Max MP effect of the passive skill.
Instead, creates a barrier of plasma at regular intervals.

name: Time of the Hunting Hounds
preview:
Changes to a skill that quickly Dashes toward enemies. Deals damage and inflicts Conductor on all enemies in the path.
Reduces the number of bounces of Chain Lightning and modifies it to be stackable.
Modifies the Arche type of the modified skills to Tech.

name: Divine Surge
preview:
Flies forward, inflicting Knockback on enemies in the path and deals large amounts of damage on landing.
Additionally, creates a path of fire in her wake that deals continuous damage to enemies within range.

name: Hymn
preview: When used on the ground, creates a zone that increases the Jump of allies. When used in midair, temporarily increases the Movement Speed of nearby allies and increases maximum movement distance.

name: Restored Heart
preview: Changes Ring of Breach and Gravitic Reversal to skills that grant buffs to allies.

name: Shattered Heart
preview:
Changes Gaze of the Abyss to an attack skill.
Builds up Suspicion stacks using Breach Spikes, then fires enhanced Breach Spikes.

name: Focused Supervision
preview:
Changes the Crushing Charge and Waste Disposal Skills
Changes the Crushing Charge Skill to a Ranged Attack Skill that fires a laser forward.
The Waste Disposal Skill now continuously consumes Toxin but deals massive damage.

name: Safety Training
preview:
Changes the Site Intrusion and Designate Danger Zone Skills
Strengthens the Protective Barrier of the Site Intrusion Skill
Changes the Designate Danger Zone Skill to provide a Protective Barrier to nearby allies.

name: Blooming Ecstasy
preview:
When attacking enemies with Snowflake Clash, applies Snowflake to enemies.
Snowflake deals AoE Explosion damage to targets.
Changes Frozen Spire to Frost Bloom, and charging enhances Frost Bloom.

name: Chill Brand
preview:
When damage is dealt to enemies with skills, creates Chill Brand. On skill attack while there are Chill Brands, deals additional damage proportional to the number of Chill Brands
Using the Glacial Wedge skill on enemies inflicts Wedge Tracking and consumes Chill Brands to deal massive damage

name: Electric Conductor
preview: When attacking enemies inflicted with Electrocution, Firearm (Explosive) ATK +8%[x]

name: Auto-Reload
preview: When changing weapons, auto-reloads stored weapon (Cooldown 15s)

preview: On Weak Point hit, Firearm Critical Hit Rate +8%[x], Firearm Critical Hit Damage +10%[x] (Cooldown 20s)

name: Weak Point Expansion
preview: On Weak Point hit, Weak Point Damage +35%[x] (Cooldown 20s)

name: Descendant Roll
preview: When Rolling, auto-reloads the active weapon at a 50% chance (Cooldown 20s)

name: Special Sight
preview: Movement Speed while Aiming -8%[x], Weak Point Damage When Aiming +8%[x]

name: Strengthen First Shot
preview: After reload, first shot's Firearm (Explosive) ATK +100%[x] (Cooldown 20s)

name: Unstoppable Smasher
preview: When defeating an enemy, Shell Capacity +30%[x] for 5s at a 8% chance.

name: Lethal Finish
preview: When firing a firearm, Critical Hit Rate +20%[+] (Cooldown 15s).

preview: When inflicting Burn, Fire ATK +22.4%[x] for 5s (Cooldown 30s)

preview: Upon inflicting Electrocution, Electric ATK +22.4%[x] for 5s (Cooldown 30s).

preview: After reload, first shot's Multi-Hit Damage +55%[x] (Cooldown 15s)

preview: On landing multi-Hit, Multi-Hit Damage +1.3%[x] for 3s (Up to 3 stacks) and inflicts Deep Wounds on the target hit.

preview: Upon a successful Weak Point attack, All Attribute ATK +1.1%[x] for 5s (Up to 10 stacks, -2 on failure)

preview: When defeating an enemy, DEF +120%[x] for 10s (Cooldown 25s)

preview: Adds Melee Weapon Fire ATK equal to 6%[x] of Melee Weapon ATK
